content: I've spent a lot of time looking into this but I still dont know what should I try and go for.
from my experience, you should just keep pulling on realm study and get a bunch of characters
save your protoparadises until you need that one awakener that you cant seem to get or you need a specific copy of a character later on down the line

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University

i would not attempt to run main dps tawil
you can use 24 as your main dps instead, she will work better until you pull more units

yeah
also watched replays
it still is not clear if you actually need to get him low/to zero, to progress
as I understood you just need to stall till he uses his "ultimate" skill and transitions to phase 2

also saw that people use arachne to kill him in <20 turns, since she ignores his fortification
wanna try it too
you dont have to do anything for the first 8 turns
just charge aliemus and sit back
stockpile plumes or whatever
